nodes.context: A Philadelphia-based gang involved in prostitution, extortion, labor racketeering, and narcotics.
A coalition of major bootleggers during Prohibition, including the Philadelphia faction.
A New York-based Mafia family involved in racketeering and garment district operations.

edges.context: Rosen, as head of the 69th Street Gang, was a member of the Big Seven aligned with the Philadelphia faction.
Rosen became partners with Tommy Lucchese, using a company to ship clothing for the Lucchese crime family.
